description: Style NoteAn eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain cult status. Made with a canvas and rubber upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.Product DetailsBlunt toed, chukka style, brown canvas shoes with up lace fasteningCanvas upper with branding near the ankle, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, toe box covered with a Nubuck overlay, two eyelets in the midfoot region above the soul, plaid checked vamp and a mock vamp with eyelets above the checked vampSlighly cushioned footbedUpper adhered to the outsoleTough rubber outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves on one side and brick styled grooves on the other sideComes with a shoe bagMaterial and CareNubuck, rubber and canvasClean the nubuck toe box using a nubuck brushTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
